'''Aycee Lameers''' was a famous [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Death stick/Legends|death stick]] addict and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was placed on his head.

{{Char-stub}}
